name: wiki-kb
should_trigger: ingest this article into the wiki
把 raw 里的文章加到 wiki 里
search wiki for information about AI agents
lint the wiki and check for contradictions
process the new source file in raw/
should_not_trigger: search the web for latest React docs
create a new skill for deployment automation
what is the capital of France?

core_function.description: Ingest: read a source from raw/, discuss takeaways, create wiki pages, update index and log
core_function.input: ingest 'Agent 的超级进化.md' from raw/
expected_outputs: wiki/sources/Agent 的超级进化.md created with summary and key takeaways
wiki/concepts/ 中创建或更新了相关概念页（如 Personalized Agent, Context injection）
wiki/entities/ 中创建或更新了相关实体页（如 Claude Code, Anthropic）
wiki/index.md updated with new page entries
